data.title: Blackmagic Design Announces DaVinci Resolve 21
data.description: In Las Vegas, DaVinci Resolve 21 has launched with several updates. The latest version includes a new Photo page, additional AI tools, fresh motion graphic effects, Fairlight folder tracks, and various other enhancements.

data.title: Qlik Brings Agentic Execution to Data Engineering
data.description: KISSIMMEE, Florida - Qlik is broadening its agentic execution approach to data engineering by launching new features that support teams in crafting, developing, and providing reliable data.

data.title: W. Capra Brings David Caudill on as Executive Consultant – Head of Technology
data.description: In Chicago, W. Capra, a leading consulting and services business, has appointed David Caudill as the Executive Consultant and Head of Technology. This addition was announced today. Mike Streams, a Partner at W. Capra, expressed excitement about Caudill joining the team, citing his successful leadership in significant digital transformations, particularly at bp. Streams emphasized the importance of innovative thinking and experienced leadership in staying competitive in convenience retail.

data.title: Oracle Stock Explodes 25% On AI Build‑Out, Bloom Energy Deal
data.description: Oracle Corp.'s stock, listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol ORCL, saw a significant surge on Tuesday morning as it redefined its standing from a legacy software rebound to an emerging AI utility story. The stock experienced a substantial climb of approximately 25% in just two sessions. This transformation was attributed to various factors such as new C-suite leadership, a substantial contractual backlog, and the implementation of green power infrastructure. Previously, concerns regarding heavy data-center capital expenditures and financial strain had created skepticism in the market. However, with the recent developments, investors have started to view Oracle in a more positive light, leading to a surge in stock value. The company's appointment of Hilary Maxson as the new Chief Financial Officer also played a crucial role in this upward trajectory. This move provided investors with confidence in Oracle's execution strategies and capital allocation. The market response has caused analysts to re-evaluate their stance on Oracle's position in the growing demand for AI infrastructure.

data.title: SiteGround Launches All-in-One Ecommerce Platform for Small Businesses
data.description: SiteGround.com, a platform based in Alexandria, Va., revealed their latest offering, SiteGround Ecommerce, on April 14, 2026. This integrated solution showcases a streamlined process, reducing the complexities involved and significantly decreasing the time required to establish an online store. SiteGround Ecommerce aids small businesses in building, hosting, and expanding their online presence efficiently. This simplified approach is positioned to revolutionize the e-commerce landscape, catering to the needs of businesses looking to enhance their digital reach and operations.

data.title: BTC surpasses $75K, soaring to a 2-month high. Crypto bears face liquidation as Ethereum and top coins surge.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has surged to its highest level in more than two months, alongside a faster rise in Ethereum and other top cryptocurrencies. This increase in value comes as a result of liquidation of crypto bears.

data.title: Kevin Warsh, nominated by Trump for Fed Chair, plans to divest over $100 million in assets to secure confirmation.
data.description: Kevin M. Warsh has pledged to liquidate a significant portion of his assets valued at over $100 million in preparation for his possible appointment as the next chair of the Federal Reserve.

data.title: BP Sees 'Exceptional' Oil Trading In Q1 Amid Middle East Tension
data.description: BP p.l.c. (NYSE: BP) stock is seeing a decline in premarket trading on Tuesday following the release of their trading update before the first-quarter FY26 results reveal on April 28. The British oil & gas company reported an 'exceptional' oil trading performance in Q1. BP's CEO Meg O'Neill has initiated a restructuring plan which will involve a shift away from green energy towards focusing on two key divisions - one for upstream business and another covering downstream operations such as refining, distribution, and retail. The company anticipates that first-quarter upstream production will remain relatively consistent compared to the previous quarter, with gas production expected to hold steady as well. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Real-Time Safety App Citizen Expands International Footprint with Launch in Mexico
data.description: Citizen, a top public safety app in the U.S., has expanded internationally into Canada and now into Mexico City, Guadalajara, and Tijuana. This move brings verified safety alerts, live video, and community-driven reporting to these Mexican cities. The expansion was announced on April 14, 2026. This marks the first step of the app's global expansion plan.
